From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**USS *Rodgers*** may refer to the following ships of the [United States Navy](/wiki/United_States_Navy "United States Navy"):

* [USS *Rodgers* (1879)](/wiki/USS_Rodgers_(1881) "USS Rodgers (1881)") was a steam [whaler](/wiki/Whaler "Whaler") launched in 1879 as *Mary and Helen*. She was purchased by the Navy in 1881 and was lost in an accidental fire later that same year.
* [USS *Rodgers* (TB-4)](/wiki/USS_Rodgers_(TB-4) "USS Rodgers (TB-4)") was a [*Foote*-class](/wiki/Foote-class_torpedo_boat "Foote-class torpedo boat") [torpedo boat](/wiki/Torpedo_boat "Torpedo boat") commissioned in 1898 and decommissioned in 1919.
* [USS *Rodgers* (DD-254)](/wiki/USS_Rodgers_(DD-254) "USS Rodgers (DD-254)") was a [*Clemson*-class](/wiki/Clemson-class_destroyer "Clemson-class destroyer") [destroyer](/wiki/Destroyer "Destroyer") commissioned in 1919 and transferred to the Royal Navy as HMS *Sherwood* in 1940.
